channel.title: Procedural Memory on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Procedural Memory on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Announcing: Episodic procedural memory in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework now has episodic procedural memory in public preview. It stores successful task patterns so agents can reuse past action sequences, tool choices, and related context on similar future requests.

  • Source: Azure Updates
